description_long: This is a medium-sized train station building constructed primarily from light gray stone with darker stone accents at the corners and around the windows. The front facade features a prominent arched entrance with double wooden doors, flanked by flower beds and large windows. Above the entrance is a clock tower with a peaked roof, clock faces on multiple sides, and a sign reading 'TRAIN STATION' mounted on top. The building has a symmetrical design with multiple rectangular windows on all sides, and a pitched roof with visible chimneys. The side elevations reveal tall, multi-pane windows and a small plaque near the base. The structure sits on a paved platform, suggesting its placement in an urban or transit-oriented environment.
description: A stone train station with a central clock tower, arched entrance, and prominent 'TRAIN STATION' signage, featuring large windows and flower beds on a paved base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the arched entrance, double doors, flower beds, clock tower, and 'TRAIN STATION' sign.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the tall, multi-pane window, clock tower profile, and flower bed along the wall.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying three large windows and the back of the 'TRAIN STATION' sign above the roof.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with another tall window, clock tower side, and flower bed, mirroring the other side.
attribute_station_signage: One large 'TRAIN STATION' sign mounted above the clock tower, visible from the front and rear.
